category_sources: source_facts.description says mandown is a man-page inspired Markdown viewer.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official Titor8115/mandown repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo identify the official GitHub repository, whose README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Titor8115/mandown, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Markdown viewer inspired by man pages.
source_facts.executables lists mdn as the command-line executable.
